name: Moclans
startIntroPart1: As Moclans we hold our cultural believes very highly while pushing forwards in construction and improvement of weaponary.
startIntroPart2: So Bortus bring us forward and show the world our superiosity!
declaringWar: You are in my way, you must be destroyed.
attacked: I do not appriciate this action against our people.
defeated: Youre military has won but you may never destroy the superior culture of the Moclans
denounced: You seem to have no understanding of the actions you are taking!
introduction: Hello, as superiors we hope of your respect.
tradeRequest: My friend, does this seem reasonable to you?

name: Calivons
startIntroPart1: We as Calvions stand above others in our technologie and interlect
startIntroPart2: Lead this nation and show our people the interesting liveforms of afar!
attacked: You fools shall end in our Zoos!
denounced: You are worthy of no respect!
tradeRequest: How could one refuse this offer?

name: Humans
startIntroPart1: We Humans have evolved past our old destructive ways and plan on a future of planitary unison
startIntroPart2: We hope that you can show the world that even something as fragile as a human can be important!
declaringWar: You have no Idea in how much truble you are.
attacked: You will see that Humans don´t take this easy
denounced: I have nothing but hatred for you.
introduction: Welcome, we hope this is a start of a great partnership!
tradeRequest: May I give you this offer?
uniques: [+2 Science] from every specialist [in all cities]

name: Kaylon
startIntroPart1: We Kaylon have suffured under our prior owners and have fought for our freedom against the tyranny and torture they put onto us.
startIntroPart2: We have to make sure that no being must ever act in that way again, even if it means Anihalation of Biologicals.
declaringWar: We cannot trust you to continue existing.
attacked: We will show that we are not to be oppressed
introduction: Greetings, I hope we can get around the trouble.
tradeRequest: This offer should be of interest for both parties.
uniques: No damage penalty for wounded units <for [Melee] units>
Gain an extra spy <upon entering the [Medival]>

name: Xelayans
startIntroPart1: We Xelayans are known for our devotion to science and advanced physical strength and hopes of warless futures.
startIntroPart2: Let us move through time, advancing and building to bring greatness to the world!
declaringWar: we do not wish this, but it has to be done...
attacked: Your Aggressive progression will be your doom!
defeated: So this is it... After all this time...
denounced: We cannot trust you at all!
introduction: We hope of peace and trade between us.
uniques: [-15]% Strength <for [All] units> <when fighting in [Enemy Land] tiles>

name: Planetary Union
startIntroPart1: The Union was created to protect and bring together all the civilizations ready for unison.
startIntroPart2: Let the Union bring wonderfull time to all!
declaringWar: We hope this can be over quickly to cut losses.
attacked: You can try to crush us but you can never crush the wish of freedom!
defeated: The Union will be rebuild under a different name by different people in the future. We have not lost!
denounced: Your actions are poison to unity
introduction: We hope to unite your glorious nation with ours soon!
uniques: Can spend Gold to annex or puppet a City-State that has been your Ally for [8] turns
[-80]% unhappiness from the number of cities

name: Krill
startIntroPart1: We are the Krill. Powerfull, smart and unstoppable. Our species will remain on top of all and that is how it shall be!
startIntroPart2: Crush the unworthy and win the divine fight!
declaringWar: This is a standard procedure. Get ready to be scavenged!
attacked: You want to succumb to us a little sooner I see.
defeated: We were not aware of this possibility...
introduction: I see you are using our future land.
hateHello: Don´t you think you are welcome...
uniques: Cities are razed [3] times as fast
